{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = void portal (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Titan]] created a void portal.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
